Where Foundations Become Futures

More than childcare. A licensed early learning center where every child is known by name, guided with purpose, and prepared for what comes next. Every family is welcome here.

Built with Heart

Founded by Parents Who Understand

Parents of nine children, with deep roots in child welfare, built BHA to be the place every child deserves: safe, joyful, and full of possibility. That lived experience shapes everything here.

Care That Fits Your Schedule

Day shifts. Night shifts. Weekends. We are here. Licensed for 24-hour care including overnight, so your child is always in trusted hands no matter when you work.

More Than a Babysitter

We Are Invested in Who They Become

A Home for Every Stage

From infants to school-age children, BHA offers year-round care, before and after school programs, and full-day year-round care for K–5th grade families.

Learning Every Day

Good Character, Big Futures

At BHA, children grow academically, emotionally, and in character. Curiosity is nurtured. Confidence is built. And every child leaves more prepared for school and for life than when they arrived.

Proudly serving Red Oak, Midlothian, Waxahachie, Cedar Hill, Ovilla, Glenn Heights, Lancaster, Duncanville, DeSoto and surrounding communities
🌱

Whole-Child Development

Social-emotional learning, curiosity, and confidence. We invest in who your child is becoming, not just what they know today.

🌟

Small Class Sizes

Low staff-to-child ratios mean every child receives individualized attention and is genuinely known by their caregivers.

🍲

Everything Included

Meals, snacks, diapers, formula. No hidden fees, no supply lists. Your tuition covers what your child needs to thrive.

🛡️

HHSC Licensed

Licensed by the Texas Health and Human Services Commission. Safety, standards, and accountability always come first.

Our Philosophy

Invested in Who They Become

We are not babysitters. We are trained educators and advocates for every child’s full potential.

📈

Social-Emotional Learning

Before letters and numbers come confidence, empathy, and self-regulation. We build the emotional foundation children carry with them for life.

🤝

Well-Trained, Caring Staff

Our educators go through rigorous training in child development, positive guidance, and social-emotional practices. These are professionals who show up for your child every single day.

🏠

Built from Personal Experience

BHA was founded by parents of nine children with deep roots in child welfare and family advocacy. That lived experience shapes every policy, every room, and every relationship here.

What’s Included

No Hidden Fees. No Surprises.

Your tuition covers everything your child needs throughout the day, every day.

  • ✓All meals and snacks through our CACFP nutrition program
  • ✓Diapers and wipes for infants and toddlers
  • ✓Formula provided for infants
  • ✓Daily updates through the Brightwheel app
  • ✓Age-appropriate activities, enrichment, and learning materials
  • ✓Transportation available for school-age children
  • ✓TWC subsidies and CCS assistance accepted
Age Groups

A Classroom for Every Child

Each classroom is designed around the developmental needs of that age group, with appropriate ratios and trained educators.

6 wks
11 mo

Nursery

Responsive caregiving, individualized feeding and sleep schedules, and the secure attachments that build lifelong trust.

12
23 mo

Toddlers

Language, movement, and social-emotional skills through guided play, exploration, and warm consistent boundaries.

2
3 yrs

Preschool

Creativity, early literacy, and the confidence that comes from being seen, encouraged, and celebrated every day.

4
5 yrs

Pre-K

School readiness built on curiosity, independence, and problem-solving alongside letters, numbers, and social skills.

5
13 yrs

School-Age

Before/after school, full-time summer, and full-day care, enrichment, and school support for K–5th grade families.

Check Availability for Your Child
Flexible Care

24 Hours.
7 Days a Week.

Most childcare centers close at 6pm. BHA is licensed for 24-hour care because real families need real flexibility.

🌞

Daytime Care

Full-day, half-day, and before/after school

🌙

Night & Overnight

Licensed overnight care for evening and night shift workers

📅

Weekends

Saturday and Sunday care available year-round

🚌

Transportation

Pickup and dropoff for school-age children

What We Believe

Our Founders’ Commitment

“

Every child who walks through our doors carries a story, a spark, and a future that deserves to be nurtured. We built Benevolent House Academy because every child, from every family, every background, every circumstance, deserves a place where they are truly seen.

”
Tanya & Christopher Orr
Founders, Benevolent House Academy
